attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
   ACV.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
   -999 AS DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
   ACV.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
   ACV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   ACV.ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
   'UNKNOWN' AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
   ACV.COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
   ACV.ATTR_PRDT_QTY,
   ACV.ATTR_PCT,
   ACV.ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
   ACV.ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
   ACV.SALES_MOTION_CD,
   ACV.SALES_MOTION_CONTEXT_NAME,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
   CURRENT_DATE AS DV_SRC_CREATED_DT,
   -999 AS SRC_CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS SRC_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
   CURRENT_DATE AS DV_SRC_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
   -999 AS SRC_LST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
   ACV.ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
   ACV.AS_TS_CD,
   ACV.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
   ACV.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
   ACV.BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
   ACV.BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
   ACV.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
   ACV.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
   ACV.SK_RENEW_CONTRACT_LINE_ID,
   ACV.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
   ACV.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
   ACV.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
   ACV.SS_CD,
   ACV.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
   ACV.START_TV_DTM,
   CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
  COALESCE(ACV.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME,
  ACV.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
  ACV.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
  ACV.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
  ACV.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
  ACV.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
  ACV.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,           
  ACV.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,                       
  ACV.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,                   
  ACV.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT, 
  'N' ACTION_CODE,
  'I' DML_TYPE,
  ACV.DV_RENEWAL_GAP_DAYS_CNT,
  ACV.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
   FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV ACV
   WHERE SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID IN ( SEL SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV_TV
									WHERE (ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL' )
									OR ORDER_ORIGIN_CD IN ( SEL ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN ))
									AND EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate' )
	 AND ACV.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
